_comment: App Insights workbook JSON template. Scenario-agnostic by default: panels key off accelerator-wide telemetry events (response.returned, tool.hitl_*, cost.call, eval.result) and filter by cloud_RoleName so a partner can swap the scenario in accelerator.yaml without touching this file. Partners rename the dashboard per engagement and add scenario-specific panels as needed.

panels.title: Successful responses per day
panels.kql: customEvents | where name == 'response.returned' | where customDimensions.ok == 'true' | summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)

panels.title: HITL approval rate
panels.kql: customEvents | where name in ('tool.hitl_approved','tool.hitl_rejected') | summarize approvals=countif(name=='tool.hitl_approved'), rejections=countif(name=='tool.hitl_rejected') by bin(timestamp, 1d)

panels.title: P95 request latency (s)
panels._note: Scenario-agnostic: filters by the accelerator's Container App role instead of a hardcoded route. Partners who want a per-endpoint breakdown add `summarize ... by name` once the scenario's endpoint path is known.
panels.kql: requests | where cloud_RoleName endswith 'api' | summarize percentile(duration/1000, 95) by bin(timestamp, 1h)

panels.title: $ per call (estimated)
panels.kql: customEvents | where name == 'cost.call' | extend cost = todouble(customMeasurements.value) | summarize avg(cost) by bin(timestamp, 1d)

panels.title: Groundedness eval score trend
panels.kql: customEvents | where name == 'eval.result' and customDimensions.suite == 'quality' | extend g = todouble(customDimensions.groundedness) | summarize avg(g) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
